markets.subtitle: greater than 4"
markets.rules_primary: If the total precipitation at Central Park, New York City in Jun 2026 is strictly greater than 4 inches, then the market resolves to Yes.

markets.subtitle: 2" to 3"
markets.rules_primary: If the total precipitation at Central Park, New York City in Jun 2026 is between 2 and 3 inches, then the market resolves to Yes.
